data.name: Reports are ordered by time. Scroll down to see older reports.
data.value: Rapporter sorteres efter tid. Scroll ned for at se ældre rapporter.

data.name: This week's report has been submitted!
data.value: Dette uges rapport er blevet indsendt!

data.name: What have you done this week? (Markdown supported)
data.value: Hvad har du gjort denne uge? (Markdown understøttes)

data.name: You have missed ALL weekly reports in the last 4 weeks! This is a serious issue. Please submit them immediately!
data.value: Du har manglet ALLE ugentlige rapporter i de sidste 4 uger! Dette er et alvorligt problem. Indsend dem umiddelbart!

data.name: You have missed submitting some weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!
data.value: Du har manglet at indsende nogle ugentlige rapporter de sidste 4 uger. Vent venligst op!

data.name: You have missed submitting weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!
data.value: Du har manglet at indsende ugentlige rapporter i de sidste 4 uger. Vær venlig at hente efter!

data.name: You haven't submitted any reports in the last 4 weeks!
data.value: Du har ikke indsendt nogen rapporter i de sidste 4 uger!

data.name: You haven't submitted this week's report yet.
data.value: Du har ikke indsendt denne uges rapport endnu.

data.name: Your reports for the last 4 weeks are all submitted.
data.value: Dine rapporter for de sidste 4 uger er alle indsendt.

data.name: 事件记录时间是协调世界时！
